nasb.text: The king of Israel went out and struck the horses and chariots, and killed the Arameans with a great slaughter.

esv.text: And the king of Israel went out and struck the horses and chariots, and struck the Syrians with a great blow.

cnv.text: 以色列王出來，攻打戰馬和戰車，大大地擊敗了亞蘭人。

ccb.text: 以色列王出城攻击敌军车马，重创亚兰人。
